query:
-- Viviane ID 84: Mão estava R$35,00, deve ser R$38,00 → comissão = 38 * 60% = 22.80
UPDATE appointments 
SET servicePrice = '38.00',
    commissionValue = '22.80'
WHERE id = 84;

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT id, clientName, servicePrice, commissionPct, commissionValue 
FROM appointments 
WHERE id = 84;
